  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Unshielded rubber coupling staged for underground use instead of a code-compliant shielded transition coupling."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the unshielded rubber coupling.",
    "Procure and install a heavy-duty shielded transition coupling rated for underground burial and the specific pipe materials."
  ],
  "rationale": "Unshielded flexible rubber couplings (often called Ferncos) lack the shear resistance provided by a stainless steel shield. When buried underground, soil settlement and shear forces can cause the pipes to misalign, leading to joint failure, blockages, or leaks. Plumbing codes (IPC) and manufacturer listings require shielded couplings for underground transitions between different pipe materials to maintain structural alignment.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 705.25",
    "ASTM C1460",
    "ASTM C1173"
  ]
}
